name: Headway
description: Headway — embeddable changelog and release notes widget that helps developer tools communicate product updates to users in-app.

seo.title: Headway — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Headway: Headway — embeddable changelog and release notes widget that helps developer tools communicate product updates to users in-app.

when_to_use: In-app changelog widget notifying users of new feature releases
Embeddable release notes page linked from developer portal
Product update notifications delivered as in-app badge alerts
Changelog feed integrated into dev-tool dashboard header
Subscriber email list built around weekly release notes digest

pros: Drop-in widget adds release notes to any app fast
Lightweight alternative to running your own changelog
Clean UX for end-user changelog reading
cons: Limited customization compared to self-hosted options
Pricing can feel steep for simple release notes
Feature velocity has been modest recent years
Basic analytics compared to product tools
review.verdict: Easy embeddable changelog for teams that don't want to build one; power users will outgrow it.
review.best_for: Small dev-tool and SaaS teams wanting in-app release notes without custom development.
review.not_for: Teams needing deep customization, rich analytics, or integration with feedback platforms.
